Bus Timings

320 Bus Timings Al Rashidiya to Academic City

December 27, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dubai’s got your back when it comes to getting around town on a budget. Enter the 320 bus your ticket from Al Rashidiya Bus Station to Academic City. It’s a godsend for students, workers, and anyone making that daily hustle.

Speaking of Al Rashidiya, this place is transport central. It’s got everything: comfy waiting spots, ticket booths, snack stops the works. And bonus points for being right next to the metro. So whether you’re bussing it or need to switch to the train, you’re sorted. Dubai’s way of keeping you moving without the hassle. Pretty sweet deal, right?

Contents

320 Bus Timings

The 320 bus operates with a frequency that caters well to peak and off-peak hours. Typically, buses run every 15 to 30 minutes, ensuring minimal wait times and a reliable schedule.

The first bus depart at 05.05 AM and the last bus depart at 11.05 PM, and here is the complete of 320 bus timings or schedule that depart from Al Al Rashidiya bus station.

From Al Rashidiya From Academic City
05:00 05:05
05:30 06:00
06:00 06:15
06:15 06:30
06:30 06:45
06:45 07:00
07:00 07:10

Download PDF Bus 320

To view the full schedule, you can check the official RTA website or follow this link for 320 Bus Timings.## 320 Bus Route From Al Rashidiya to Academic City

The 320 bus route takes you through a fascinating cross-section of Dubai. com/x25-bus-timings/) and Dubai Outsource City before reaching Academic City.

This route is not just a commute but a journey through some of Dubai’s rapidly developing zones, and here are several of key stops of 320 bus route.

  1. Centrepoint Metro Station Gate 5

  2. Silicon Oasis:

  3. Dubai Men’s College

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Heriot-Watt University Dubai Campus

  2. Bits Pilani 1

  3. Manipal University 2

  4. Dubai Outsource City

  5. Dubai Academic City

Other bus routes in Dubai that you can explore include the E315 bus route, which runs from Etisalat to Muwailah, and the C1 bus route, which travels from Airport Terminal to Satwa Bus Station.Read Also: 309 Bus Timings and Route ## Fare and Distance

Traveling on the 320 bus route is economical. The fare is calculated based on the zones you travel through, which can be easily paid using the Nol Card Dubai’s unified card for all modes of public transport.

The total distance covered by the 320 bus is approximately 22 kilometers, making it a relatively short yet crucial route in the city’s public transportation network.## About The Academic City

At the end of the route lies Academic City, a thriving hub for higher education in Dubai.

It’s a dynamic area buzzing with students and academic activities, surrounded by amenities such as cafes, bookstores, and student housing.## Journey Experience

The 320 bus from Al Rashidiya to Academic City provides a lengthy but enriching journey through Dubai’s diverse neighborhoods.

This route not only highlights Dubai’s rapid development but also showcases its commitment to education and innovation, making it a meaningful trip for those interested in the city’s evolving landscape.## Conclusion

The 320 bus route from Al Rashidiya Bus Station to Academic City is more than just a commute; it’s a lifeline for many residents in Dubai. And by knowing 320 bus timetable, you can go to the bus station according to the departure schedule.

Whether you’re a student heading to class, a professional traveling for work, or simply exploring the city, this route offers a convenient, reliable, and affordable means of transportation.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: December 27, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
